title: Why Entergy (ETR) is a Top Value Stock for the Long-Term
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: AES Q1 Revenues Surpass Estimates, Earnings Increase Y/Y
text: AES' Q1 revenues of $3,239 million increase 13.6% year over year. Revenues also beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 13.8%.
